title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. Layers: (1) prevFgHint early capture before EnsureCdpConnection, (2) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) not SW_MINIMIZE(6), (3) ForceForegroundWindow(AttachThreadInput) replacing silent-fail SetForegroundWindowRaw, (4) StartFocusWatchdog 200ms background loop during entire ask op, (5) RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync retry loop (150ms / 5s timeout) per step, (6) FocuslessWarningOverlay + ActionApi.OnFocusStealer prop stamp. AutoHeal partial: AutoBugReport (Slack) already fires via OnFocusStealer. FireAutoHeal NOT yet triggered. CRITICAL GAP: after 5s restore timeout, system gives up silently -- no Slack alert, no FireAutoHeal, user focus permanently lost.
steps: 0. [PRIORITY-1] On theft detected: IMMEDIATELY force-restore user latest focus -- ForceForegroundWindow must fire the instant theft is detected, not after overlay/logging overhead. Watchdog tick: move ForceForegroundWindow BEFORE notification logic.
1. prevFgGemini = GetForegroundWindow() BEFORE EnsureCdpConnection (not after tab switch)
2. EnsureCdpReadyAsync(prevFgHint) -- uses hint so EnsureCdp uses correct pre-switch prevFg
3. StartFocusWatchdog(prevFg, cdp) -- 200ms poll, Chrome-PID filter, ForceForegroundWindow per tick
4. GuardCdpFocusTheft after each insert step -- Task.Run RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync fire-and-forget
5. LogRestoreFocus at send/complete checkpoints -- delegates to RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync (fire-and-forget)
6. RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: snapshot IME+cursor -> IMMEDIATE ForceForegroundWindow -> OnFocusStealer(AutoBugReport+overlay) -> retry loop -> restore IME+cursor
8. [DONE] AutoBugReport fires via ActionApi.OnFocusStealer inside step 6
9. [TODO-P2] FireAutoHeal on restore timeout: after 5s exhausted add AutoBugReport(unrecoverable) + FireAutoHeal(focus-theft, chromeHwnd) for AI triad analysis + Slack alert
10. [TODO-P3] InputReadiness.Probe() before ask input -- currently EnsureCdpReadyAsync is manual partial substitute; OnProbeSuccess event (auto-hack) never fires
11. [TODO-P4] prevFg re-capture between phases: persona inject / file attach / question send all use same initial snapshot
author: claude
